loop.observation: The refactoring charter defines executable surface-area rules and architecture-docs CI already emits refactorcharter evidence, but executable knowledge coverage still treated the charter manifest as loop-less.
loop.hypothesis: Adding the evidence loop to the charter manifest and verifying workflow binding will keep the charter as executable policy rather than narrative guidance.
loop.execute: Strictly decode the charter, verify semantic units and required artifact categories, scan configured repository roots for files over the target line budget, and publish refactorcharter evidence in architecture-docs CI.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails on malformed charter JSON, incomplete loop metadata, invalid mode, missing semantic units, missing artifact categories, invalid scan roots, missing workflow evidence binding, or enforced over-budget files.
loop.retrospective: Refactoring guidance remains an evidence-producing policy: advisory findings are observable and can be promoted to enforced gates when the repository is ready.
